name: context-menu
description: Displays a menu triggered by right-click

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuRoot, type ContextMenuRootProps } from 'reka-ui'

const props = defineProps<ContextMenuRootProps>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuRoot v-bind="props">
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuRoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuTrigger as ContextMenuTriggerPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuTriggerPrimitive as-child>
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuTriggerPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuPortal, ContextMenuContent as ContextMenuContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuPortal>
    <ContextMenuContentPrimitive
      :class="
        cn(
          'z-50 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden border-3 border-foreground bg-popover p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))]',
          $props.class
        )
      "
    >
      <slot />
    </ContextMenuContentPrimitive>
  </ContextMenuPortal>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuItem as ContextMenuItemPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
  inset?: boolean
  disabled?: boolean
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuItemPrimitive
    :disabled="disabled"
    :class="
      cn(
        'relative flex cursor-default select-none items-center px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none transition-all duration-150 focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground focus:translate-x-1 data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none data-[disabled]:opacity-50',
        inset && 'pl-8',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuItemPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuRadioGroup as ContextMenuRadioGroupPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'

defineProps<{
  modelValue?: string
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  'update:modelValue': [value: string]
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuRadioGroupPrimitive
    :model-value="modelValue"
    @update:model-value="emit('update:modelValue', $event as string)"
  >
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuRadioGroupPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuLabel as ContextMenuLabelPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
  inset?: boolean
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuLabelPrimitive
    :class="
      cn(
        'px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide',
        inset && 'pl-8',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuLabelPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuSeparator as ContextMenuSeparatorPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuSeparatorPrimitive :class="cn('-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-foreground', $props.class)" />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuSub as ContextMenuSubPrimitive, type ContextMenuSubProps } from 'reka-ui'

const props = defineProps<ContextMenuSubProps>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuSubPrimitive v-bind="props">
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuSubPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuSubTrigger as ContextMenuSubTriggerPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { ChevronRight } from 'lucide-vue-next'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
  inset?: boolean
  disabled?: boolean
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuSubTriggerPrimitive
    :disabled="disabled"
    :class="
      cn(
        'flex cursor-default select-none items-center px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none focus:bg-accent data-[state=open]:bg-accent',
        inset && 'pl-8',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
    <ChevronRight class="ml-auto h-4 w-4 stroke-[3]" />
  </ContextMenuSubTriggerPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { ContextMenuSubContent as ContextMenuSubContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <ContextMenuSubContentPrimitive
    :class="
      cn(
        'z-50 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden border-3 border-foreground bg-popover p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))]',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </ContextMenuSubContentPrimitive>
</template>
